acceptance_criteria.text: Legacy AIAgents can be migrated into persona/voice-backed blueprints through an idempotent, non-destructive apply path.
proof: apply_legacy_ai_agent_migration() creates communications blueprint wrappers with persona_agent_id.
gaps: Production data apply was not executed in this local proof bundle.

acceptance_criteria.text: Deprecated business ai_agent_* fields are migration sources and runtime gates prefer active blueprints.
proof: ai_agent_webhooks.py no longer filters WHERE ai_agent_enabled = 1.
gaps: Physical column removal deferred until Alembic cleanup.

proof: ai_agent.py stores legacy_workflow_context and returns workflow: [].
chats_api.py stores workflow only as deprecated context.
Regression assertions guard prompt/state workflow usage.

acceptance_criteria.text: Legacy product/admin UI entrypoints are removed or redirected.
gaps: Physical component source deletion deferred until route/import proof.

acceptance_criteria.text: My Agents cockpit has product polish for versions, learning, rollback/activate, migration, and approval reasons.
Docs and OpenClaw contract describe the unified cleanup model.

proof: cd frontend && npm run build passed.
Production deploy smoke passed for backend route/source checks and live frontend chunk checks.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m py_compile src/api/agent_blueprints_api.py src/services/agent_legacy_migration.py src/ai_agent_webhooks.py src/chats_api.py src/ai_agent.py
known_gaps: Physical field deletion requires backup, Alembic migration, and a dedicated production removal step.
Non-destructive migration apply endpoint is deployed, but no bulk production data mutation was run from the deploy shell.
